SEARCH
パッケージ org.unlaxer.infra.syslenz4j

クラス MetricRegistry

java.lang.Object
org.unlaxer.infra.syslenz4j.MetricRegistry
public class MetricRegistry extends Object
Registry for custom application metrics.

Applications use this to expose domain-specific values alongside the built-in JVM metrics. All registered metrics are included in every snapshot produced by SyslenzAgent.

Usage


 MetricRegistry reg = SyslenzAgent.registry();

 // Gauge: reads a value each time a snapshot is taken
 reg.gauge("queue_size", () -> myQueue.size());

 // Counter: wraps an AtomicLong-style supplier
 reg.counter("requests_total", requestCounter::get);

 // Text: a descriptive label
 reg.text("app_version", () -> "2.3.1");

Thread-safe: metrics can be registered from any thread at any time.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • MetricRegistry

      public MetricRegistry()

  • メソッドの詳細

    • gauge

      public void gauge(String name, MetricRegistry.NumberSupplier supplier)
      Register a gauge metric. The supplier is called each time a snapshot is taken; it should return the current value.
      パラメータ:
      name - metric name (e.g. "queue_size")
      supplier - supplies the current value

    • gauge

      public void gauge(String name, MetricRegistry.NumberSupplier supplier, String description)
      Register a gauge metric with a description.

    • counter

      public void counter(String name, MetricRegistry.NumberSupplier supplier)
      Register a counter metric. Semantically the same as a gauge but signals that the value is monotonically increasing.
      パラメータ:
      name - metric name (e.g. "requests_total")
      supplier - supplies the current count

    • counter

      public void counter(String name, MetricRegistry.NumberSupplier supplier, String description)
      Register a counter metric with a description.

    • text

      public void text(String name, MetricRegistry.StringSupplier supplier)
      Register a text metric (labels, versions, etc.).
      パラメータ:
      name - metric name (e.g. "app_version")
      supplier - supplies the current text value

    • text

      public void text(String name, MetricRegistry.StringSupplier supplier, String description)
      Register a text metric with a description.

    • remove

      public void remove(String name)
      Remove a previously registered metric.
